text.title: IndieHackers Build-in-Public Strategy Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of IndieHackers Build-in-Public Strategy.

example.trace: give-first 3 weeks (15 replies) → monthly update 1: revenue $800, churn 4%, lesson on pricing → engage 5 comments per post → 12-week retro: 60 trial signups, decision: continue
